org.arakhne.tinyMAS.demo.preypredator3

Class WorldGrid

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.AbstractEnvironment<AT>
      • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.situatedEnvironment.environment.AbstractSituatedEnvironment<Animal,AnimalBody,SituatedObject,AnimalPerception,AnimalInfluence>
        • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.demo.preypredator3.WorldGrid
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Environment<Animal>, SituatedEnvironment<Animal,AnimalBody,SituatedObject,AnimalPerception,AnimalInfluence>
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public class WorldGrid
extends AbstractSituatedEnvironment<Animal,AnimalBody,SituatedObject,AnimalPerception,AnimalInfluence>
    GRILLE. L'environnement de notre simulation.

    Travaux pratiques d'IA54.
    Université de Technologie de Belfort-monbéliard.

    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>

      • applyInfluences

        protected boolean applyInfluences(Collection<AnimalInfluence> influences)
        Deprecated. 
        Description copied from class: AbstractSituatedEnvironment
        This function is called when the environment must compute its reaction to the agent influences.

        This method must fill the list of reactions according to its computation on the agent's influences.

        Specified by:
        applyInfluences in class AbstractSituatedEnvironment<Animal,AnimalBody,SituatedObject,AnimalPerception,AnimalInfluence>
        Returns:
        true if the reaction was successfully computed, otherwise false
